messages.text: You carve into {target} with the cinder warblade and its burning edge sears the wound shut. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} carves into you with a cinder warblade whose edge burns as it bites. The blows {verb} you!
{source} carves into {target} with a burning cinder warblade.
You sweep the cinder warblade at {target} and it hisses through empty air.
{source} sweeps a cinder warblade at you and it hisses past.
{source} sweeps a cinder warblade at {target} and misses.
You bury the cinder warblade deep in {target} and its trapped fire erupts along the blade! Your strike {verb} them!
{source} buries a cinder warblade deep in you and its trapped fire erupts! The blows {verb} you!
{source} buries a cinder warblade deep in {target} and fire bursts along the blade!
